title: Understanding the Problem
text: The position of the particle is given by the equation $$x(t)=4-2t$$. To find when the particle crosses the origin, we need to determine when $$x(t)=0$$.

title: Setting Up the Equation
text: Set the position equation equal to zero: $$4-2t=0$$. Solve this equation to find the time $$t$$ when the particle crosses the origin.

title: Solving for $$t$$
text: Rearrange the equation $$4-2t=0$$ to solve for $$t$$. What is the value of $$t$$?
